name: Matte Fish Belly White
topApplication: Wardrobe Shutters · Kitchen Cabinets · TV Unit · Pooja Doors
bestFor: Modular furniture wrap — wardrobes, kitchens, vanities
keyStrength: Pure white Statuario cloud vein, matte finish — fills Essential Slot #1 (Classic White + Grey Vein); most demanded marble film colour in India
keyWeakness: Asymmetric vein cloud creates obvious pattern repeat across multi-door installations; flat film surface — no tactile depth
priorityFix: Request EIR micro-emboss matte variant from supplier — adds haptic stone quality, projects score to ~85/100
